adversarial.notes: Independently re-derived (not trusted from generator or Mode-B evidence): (1) `git diff HEAD` freshly captured during this QA pass byte-matches `.agent/evidence/034/diff.patch` exactly (`diff -u` produces zero output) -- the only tracked-file change is ecosystem/README.md's single-line 02-row flip (Planned -> Shipped); the new ecosystem/02_evidence_baseline.md is untracked and correctly does not appear in a `git diff HEAD` capture (expected git semantics, not a gap -- its existence and content are independently verified by entries 1-8 instead). No 038-attributable divergence exists in the diff at all, since 034's tracked-file footprint is exactly the one README line; no attribution note was needed. (2) `git status --porcelain --untracked-files=all -- . ':(exclude).agent'` confirms the only changed paths outside .agent/ are ecosystem/README.md (modified) and ecosystem/02_evidence_baseline.md (new), plus the pre-existing untracked v0.6.0-release-notes.md -- matching the contract's scope exactly, independently re-confirming entry 12's scope-guard PASS with a manual read of the raw status output rather than trusting the guard's own PASS string alone. (3) Mutation probe: copied the REAL, shipped ecosystem/02_evidence_baseline.md to a disposable scratch copy (never the real repository tree) and replaced the literal Section-4 phrase 'A baseline MUST NOT mix evidence from unspecified revisions' with a paraphrase ('A baseline should avoid mixing evidence from unspecified revisions'); re-ran entry 6's exact, unmodified command against the mutated scratch copy (via a scratch 'miniroot' containing the real, unmodified tools/verify_lib.sh) -- correctly flips to FAIL ('Revision and Timestamp Anchoring Rule section missing one of: revision / timestamp / ... / FAIL condition'), confirming the live PASS on the real, unmutated shipped file is genuine and not a residual or vacuous false-pass. No file in the working repository tree was altered by this probe; the mutated copy existed only under the evaluator's own scratchpad and was afterward overwritten back to the real file's content (a scratch-only file, with zero effect on the repository).

final_verdict.summary: PASS. All 18 contract (revision 1) verification commands independently re-run from repo root and all exited 0/PASS against the implemented working tree, matching Mode-B's claimed B1-B8 result and the generator's captured evidence (all 18 flat 034-verify-NN.txt files, each format-compliant with invocation-first/EXIT-last and verbatim-matching the live contract's commands, plus the consolidated .agent/evidence/034/verification.txt). The evidence bundle is confirmed genuine and current: .agent/evidence/034/diff.patch byte-matches a freshly captured `git diff HEAD` (zero diff lines) and contains exactly the one expected ecosystem/README.md hunk, with no divergence to attribute to feature 038's concurrent work. bash tools/validate.sh reports the full default sweep at SUMMARY: 11 passed, 0 failed (exit 0) -- no regression. Feature 034's acceptance criteria in .agent/feature_list_005.json (baseline fields and evidence rules defined; cannot mix evidence from unspecified revisions; the embedded coarse whole-document check; frontmatter validity; compliance validator green) are all satisfied with evidence traceable by path. Scope was independently re-confirmed by a manual read of raw git-status output: only ecosystem/README.md (one-line flip) and the new ecosystem/02_evidence_baseline.md changed outside .agent/, with no 038 surface touched. An adversarial mutation probe against a disposable scratch copy of the REAL shipped document (paraphrasing away the literal 'MUST NOT mix evidence from unspecified revisions' phrase) confirms entry 6 genuinely discriminates on the actual implementation, not merely on a pre-implementation fixture. No issues, no missing acceptance coverage, no unsupported claims found. Per the coordinator's explicit instruction and the precedent already established in .agent/qa/031.json, feature_list_005.json's F-034 status field, .agent/run_state.json, and every feature-038 surface were left untouched by this QA pass; this .agent/qa/034.json artifact is the durable pass signal for the orchestrator to act on.
